prestazioni: Turbocharged 2.0L TSI (engine code **CCTA**) upgrade with a **Garrett GT2867R .86 A/R turbo** (hybrid core, billet compressor wheel) for 320+ HP, paired with a **Forge Motorsport Motorsport 3-port boost solenoid** and **034 Motorsport high-flow fuel pump** to support the increased airflow.

Full **APR Stage 3+ ECU/TCU software** (custom-tuned for the CCTA engine) with **NGK 97506 Iridium IX spark plugs** (gapped at 0.024") and a **Milltek Sport 3" turbo-back exhaust system** (catless downpipe, resonated center section) to optimize spool and reduce backpressure.

**KW Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable)** with **Eibach Pro-Spacer 15mm wheel spacers** (hub-centric, 5x112 bolt pattern) and **H&R 24mm rear anti-roll bar** to eliminate body roll, paired with **Brembo GT 355mm front brake kit** (6-piston calipers, 32mm rotors) for consistent stopping power.
estetica: **Rieger Tuning Exeo ST-specific widebody kit** (front/rear fenders, side skirts, and rear diffuser) in **PPG Porsche GT3 RS Lime Gold** with **Vorsteiner V-FF107 19x9.5 ET35 forged wheels** (staggered setup, 235/35 front, 265/30 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires**.

**Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (OEM-style latches, vented) and **Maxton Design front splitter** (3D-printed ABS, adjustable angle) with **AWE Tuning dual 90mm carbon fiber exhaust tips** (matte finish) for a subtle yet aggressive rear end.

**OEM+ interior overhaul**: **Recaro Sportster CS seats** (alcantara/leather, 6-point Schroth harnesses), **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede), and **AEM X-Series digital boost/fuel pressure gauge** (mounted in **Votex A-pillar pod**) with **LED footwell lighting (Philips RGB).
